testcase.classname: mock server receives events and auto-responds
testcase.name: mock server receives events and auto-responds

testcase.classname: sync concurrent sessions silently skips second sync while one is in progress
testcase.name: sync concurrent sessions silently skips second sync while one is in progress

testcase.classname: sync concurrent sessions allows new sync after previous one completes
testcase.name: sync concurrent sessions allows new sync after previous one completes

testcase.classname: sync conflict resolution (LWW) server overwrites client when server timestamp is newer (LWW)
testcase.name: sync conflict resolution (LWW) server overwrites client when server timestamp is newer (LWW)

testcase.classname: sync conflict resolution (LWW) client version preserved when client timestamp is newer (LWW)
testcase.name: sync conflict resolution (LWW) client version preserved when client timestamp is newer (LWW)

testcase.classname: sync conflict resolution (LWW) server soft-delete overrides local update (delete always wins)
testcase.name: sync conflict resolution (LWW) server soft-delete overrides local update (delete always wins)

testcase.classname: SyncService integration pulls all data from server when syncing for first time (new device, empty DB)
testcase.name: SyncService integration pulls all data from server when syncing for first time (new device, empty DB)

testcase.classname: SyncService integration sends local data and receives server data on first sync
testcase.name: SyncService integration sends local data and receives server data on first sync

testcase.classname: SyncService integration receives only updated records from server (incremental pull)
testcase.name: SyncService integration receives only updated records from server (incremental pull)

testcase.classname: SyncService integration sends local updates to server (incremental push)
testcase.name: SyncService integration sends local updates to server (incremental push)

testcase.classname: SyncService integration propagates soft-deleted records from server
testcase.name: SyncService integration propagates soft-deleted records from server

testcase.classname: SyncService integration follows the correct sync protocol event ordering
testcase.name: SyncService integration follows the correct sync protocol event ordering

testcase.classname: SyncService integration updates last sync timestamp on completion
testcase.name: SyncService integration updates last sync timestamp on completion

testcase.classname: sync network resilience recovers after connection drop and retry with fresh server
testcase.name: sync network resilience recovers after connection drop and retry with fresh server

testcase.classname: sync network resilience times out handshake when server does not respond
testcase.name: sync network resilience times out handshake when server does not respond

testcase.classname: sync network resilience rolls back buffered data if SYNC_COMPLETE never arrives
testcase.name: sync network resilience rolls back buffered data if SYNC_COMPLETE never arrives

testcase.classname: sync partial failures continues processing valid records when one record fails FK constraint
testcase.name: sync partial failures continues processing valid records when one record fails FK constraint

testcase.classname: sync partial failures sends SYNC_DATA_CONFIRM with ERROR status when handleIncomingSyncData fails
testcase.name: sync partial failures sends SYNC_DATA_CONFIRM with ERROR status when handleIncomingSyncData fails

testcase.classname: sync partial failures rolls back buffered data if SYNC_COMPLETE never arrives
testcase.name: sync partial failures rolls back buffered data if SYNC_COMPLETE never arrives

testcase.classname: sync clock drift handling normalizes space-separated timestamps to ISO 8601 with T separator
testcase.name: sync clock drift handling normalizes space-separated timestamps to ISO 8601 with T separator

testcase.classname: sync clock drift handling handles server reporting positive clock_drift_seconds without crashing
testcase.name: sync clock drift handling handles server reporting positive clock_drift_seconds without crashing

testcase.classname: sync clock drift handling handles server reporting negative clock_drift_seconds without crashing
testcase.name: sync clock drift handling handles server reporting negative clock_drift_seconds without crashing
